creator: bob@eager.cx
text:
Created attachment 221613
Patches for files in ports tree

This upgrades rexx-regina from 3.9.1 to 3.9.3

Changes:
- new patches for new files from upstream
- removal of patches now implemented upstream
- minor cleanup of Makefile, including change of distfile name

New files:
files/patch-stack.c
files/patch-threader,c
files/patch-yaccsrc.c   (yes, this is required as well as the next line)
files/patch-yaccsrc.y

Deleted files:
files/patch-Makefile.in
